BotTracking.AIChatbotsOverviewHelp1: The AI Chatbots Overview page provides insights into website traffic originating from AI chatbots such as ChatGPT and other large language model–based assistants. These reports track key metrics including the number of requests made by these bots, the pages and documents they access, and any errors encountered. They also offer detailed breakdowns showing which bots visit specific page URLs, helping you understand how AI chatbots interact with your content and identify opportunities to improve visibility and accessibility for AI-driven users.
BotTracking.AIChatbotsOverviewHelp2: It’s important to note that none of these pages were actually viewed by humans in the traditional way — all requests originate from AI chatbots fetching content automatically.
BotTracking.AIChatbotsOverviewHelp3: Currently, these reports exclusively include requests from AI chatbots that do not execute JavaScript. They do not include traffic from AI crawlers used for training AI models or from AI agents capable of executing JavaScript.
BotTracking.AIChatbotsReportDocumentation: Discover which AI chatbots are crawling your site and how many hits each one generates. Expand a chatbot to review the most frequently requested pages or documents.
BotTracking.ChatbotsOverTimeReportDocumentation: This report charts the evolution of AI chatbot activity. Click any metric to enlarge its graph and review the underlying trend.
BotTracking.ColumnAcquiredVisitsDocumentation: Visits that started after someone clicked from an AI chatbot (Referrers → AI Assistants).
BotTracking.ColumnClickThroughRateDocumentation: Share of AI chatbot requests that resulted in acquired visits (acquired visits ÷ requests).
BotTracking.ColumnDocumentRequestsDocumentation: Total number of bot requests to document URLs recorded during the selected period.
BotTracking.ColumnNotFoundRequestsDocumentation: Number of bot requests that returned an HTTP 404 or 410 response, including document URLs.
BotTracking.ColumnPageRequestsDocumentation: Total number of bot requests to page URLs recorded during the selected period.
BotTracking.ColumnRequestsDocumentation: Total number of bot requests recorded during the selected period. Includes both page and document URLs.
BotTracking.ColumnServerErrorRequestsDocumentation: Number of bot requests that returned an HTTP 5xx response, including document URLs.
BotTracking.ColumnUniqueAiChatbotsDocumentation: AI chatbot user agents detected during the selected period.
BotTracking.ColumnUniqueDocumentUrlsDocumentation: Distinct download or document URLs requested by AI chatbots.
BotTracking.ColumnUniquePageUrlsDocumentation: Distinct page URLs requested by AI chatbots.
BotTracking.NoDataAmazonCloudFrontInstructions1: This integration uses an AWS Lambda that reads Amazon CloudFront access logs from S3 and sends Matomo hits in batches. The tracker code is maintained externally, so follow the repository README for the current setup and deployment details.
BotTracking.NoDataAmazonCloudFrontInstructions2: Deploy the Lambda (Node.js) and set your Matomo URL and site ID.
BotTracking.NoDataAmazonCloudFrontInstructions3: Attach an S3 trigger for Amazon CloudFront log objects (for example, ObjectCreated on .gz logs).
BotTracking.NoDataAmazonCloudFrontInstructions4: Verify the setup by checking that AI Chatbot hits are showing in tracking reports.
BotTracking.NoDataCloudflareInstructions1: This integration uses a Cloudflare Worker that proxies requests to your origin and asynchronously posts Matomo hits without delaying responses. The tracker code is maintained externally, so follow the repository README for the current setup and deployment details.
BotTracking.NoDataCloudflareInstructions2: Deploy the Worker (Node.js) and set your Matomo URL and site ID.
BotTracking.NoDataCloudflareInstructions3: Attach the Worker to your zone or route so it runs inline with requests.
BotTracking.NoDataCloudflareInstructions4: Verify the setup by checking that AI Chatbot hits are showing in tracking reports.
BotTracking.NoDataHttpTrackingApiDescription: The HTTP Tracking API lets you track AI chatbot requests directly when you need a custom integration. Start with the %1$sTracking API knowledge base%2$s and use the %3$sHTTP Tracking API reference%4$s for the latest bot tracking parameters and behaviors.
BotTracking.NoDataWordPressInstructions1: The WordPress integration adds a small bridge that sends AI Chatbot signals to Matomo. Because the tracker is maintained externally, the README is the source of truth for current steps.
BotTracking.NoDataWordPressInstructions3: Enter your Matomo URL and site ID.
BotTracking.NoDataWordPressInstructions4: Verify the setup by checking that AI Chatbot hits are showing in tracking reports.
BotTracking.NoRecentAIBotRequests: %1$sNo data collected in the last 7 days.%2$s %3$sSet up AI Chatbot tracking now%4$s.
BotTracking.PluginDescription: Track and analyze visits from AI chatbots such as ChatGPT-User and similar. This plugin helps you understand how AI-driven tools interact with your website by logging and reporting bot-triggered requests.
BotTracking.SegmentNotSupported: Report does not support segmentation. The data displayed is your standard, unsegmented report data.
BotTracking.SiteWithoutDataChooseTrackingMethod: Choose your AI Chatbot Tracking Method
BotTracking.SiteWithoutDataChooseTrackingMethodPream: Track AI chatbots accessing your website to understand how your content is discovered and consumed by AI-powered assistants.
AI chatbots typically do not execute JavaScript. As a result, they are not tracked by default JavaScript-based analytics, and additional tracking configuration is required.
BotTracking.SiteWithoutDataInstallWithXRecommendatio: Install AI Chatbots tracking with %1$s (recommended for you)
BotTracking.SiteWithoutDataNotYetReady: Not ready to set up AI Chatbot Tracking just yet?
BotTracking.SiteWithoutDataOtherInstallMethods: Other methods to track AI Chatbots
BotTracking.SiteWithoutDataOtherInstallMethodsIntro: We offer multiple tracking paths - select the one that matches your setup.
BotTracking.SiteWithoutDataRecommendationText: We have detected that your website is using %1$s, so you can set up AI Chatbots tracking using our official %1$s integration.
